title: Tooltip Scrolling
body:
This project is a fork of [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll) that makes it compatible with Legendary Tooltips.



![Scrolling a Legendary Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05a5ceaf9daf62a1710dc6665737f678f63575f6.gif)



It is recommended to use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) in order to change config values
